posts.title: A tiny vision gemma and nasty tiny mamba
posts.excerpt: I released these models months ago on Hugging Face, but I'm reposting the links in this post to keep track of them.(click here)
posts.content:
# A Tiny Vision Gemma3 with 270M Parameters and Tiny Language Model Mamba3

I released these models months ago on Hugging Face, but I'm reposting the links in this post to keep track of them.(click here)

## Gemma3 270M

I just added a simple projector layer to the 270M version of Gemma and validated that it has multimodal capabilities using the CIFAR-10 dataset.

[Link here](https://huggingface.co/openwaifudotcom/multigemma3-270m)

## Tiny Mamba3

This is just a kinky Mamba3-based model trained on a custom NSFW dataset (be aware).

[Link here](https://huggingface.co/openwaifudotcom/nasty-mamba-3/)

This model is so small that you can even run it in the browser.

[ONNX inference](https://recursive-eromamba.b-cdn.net/dist/onnx_inference.html)
